This shift could reshape the market, prompting earlier prescriptions and potentially altering societal views on weight management and body acceptance.

description: A Russian missile strike on Kharkiv killed at least seven people, including two children, after a residential apartment block was destroyed. The attack was part of a wider wave of strikes across Ukraine, with other regions also reporting casualties and injuries. Poland scrambled military aircraft in response to the ongoing Russian assaults.

title: US clears $151.8m sale of 12,000 bomb casings to Israel as conflict with Iran escalates
description: The US has greenlit an emergency $151.8 million arms sale of bomb casings to Israel amidst escalating Middle East conflict. This move, bypassing Congress, aims to bolster Israel's defense and deter regional threats. The sale includes crucial support services, with some equipment drawn from US stockpiles, as fighting intensifies between Israel and Iran.

Despite a wicket, Chakravarthy conceded 64 runs in the T20 World Cup semi-final, a costly spell. Ashwin advised tactical adjustments and warned against bowling round the wicket to left-handers, emphasizing the need for improved length and line variations.

description: Shoaib Akhtar praised Will Jacks after his all-round effort against India national cricket team in the T20 World Cup semifinal, calling him “Goron ka Hardik Pandya.” Jacks took two wickets, including Sanju Samson, and scored 35 runs. Despite his performance, England lost by seven runs as India advanced to the final.

description: A shocking incident unfolded in Bhopal Rural where a 41-year-old man allegedly raped an 8-year-old girl. The accused lured the child into his shanty, trapping her inside. Her screams alerted a neighbor, leading to her rescue by locals who apprehended and thrashed the suspect before police arrived. The accused faces charges under BNS and POCSO Act.

IND vs NZ final: What happens if rain washes out Ahmedabad clash?
description: India national cricket team will face New Zealand national cricket team in the 2026 T20 World Cup final at Narendra Modi Stadium, aiming to defend their title after beating England in the semifinal. If rain disrupts the match, officials will try to finish it the same day or use a reserve day. If no result is possible, both teams share the title. A tie will be decided through repeated Super Overs until a winner emerges.

title: 'Cracking inflation whip on public': Opposition slams Centre over LPG cylinder price hike
description: Opposition parties have sharply criticised the BJP-led government following a Rs 60 increase in domestic LPG cylinder prices and Rs 115 for commercial cylinders. Leaders from Congress and TMC accused Prime Minister Modi of burdening households with rising costs, while the government assured sufficient fuel supplies amidst West Asia tensions.

title: Watch: US strikes 3,000 targets in Iran in 7 days of Operation Epic Fury
description: US forces have reportedly struck over 3,000 targets in Operation Epic Fury's first week amidst escalating conflict with Iran. President Trump demanded Iran's unconditional surrender, while Israel launched airstrikes in Lebanon and Iran retaliated with drone and missile attacks.  Regional tensions are soaring, with significant casualties and displacement reported.

title: Accompanied by band-baja, Minister protests against Bajwa for ‘casteist’ remark
Explained: How Iran war is driving sharp rise in oil and gas prices
description: Global oil prices have surged dramatically this week. The ongoing conflict involving Iran has intensified, raising fears of prolonged energy supply disruptions from the Middle East. Key energy routes and facilities are disrupted. This has pushed oil and gas prices higher across global markets. Consumers and businesses are facing rising fuel costs.

title: Pakistan's Asim Munir meets Saudi defence minister: Is 'Islamic Nato' in play?
description: Pakistan's army chief Asim Munir met Saudi Defence Minister Khalid bin Salman amidst escalating Middle East tensions following Iranian attacks. The meeting discussed halting these strikes under their Joint Strategic Defense Agreement, highlighting concerns for regional security. This follows reports of Turkey seeking a defense alliance with Pakistan and Saudi Arabia, potentially forming an 'Islamic Nato'.

title: Aspirants need to have an open, learning mind: Economics graduate who secured AIR 25
After Microsoft and Amazon, Google tells users: Anthropic is available, even after ban

This comes after the Pentagon blacklisted the startup over supply chain risks due to its refusal to grant unrestricted access for applications deemed unsafe. Despite the Pentagon's move, major cloud providers are backing Anthropic's commercial use.

description: Shocking discovery in Alappuzha as cleaning staff found human body parts, including a right arm and toe, beneath a train coach on Saturday. The Alappuzha–Dhanbad Express was stationed at the pit-line yard when the grim find was made. Railway police have initiated an unnatural death investigation, seeking information from other states to trace the origin of the remains.

UP headmistress gets foot massage from Class 5 students during school hours, suspended
description: A government primary school headmistress in Chitrakoot district has been suspended. A video showing a student giving her a foot massage during school hours went viral. The incident occurred at the Naya Bazar school. The headmistress denies the allegations, claiming the video is doctored. An inspection report led to her suspension.

title: In rage after neighbour hurt her son, Trichy woman hurls puppies against wall; 2 die
description: A Trichy woman, enraged after her neighbor allegedly injured her son, killed two newborn stray puppies she mistakenly believed were being cared for by the neighbor. CCTV footage of the brutal act sparked public outcry. Both women have been arrested, with charges including cruelty to animals and causing injury.

title: ‘He came to save us’: Family says Delhi youth was lured on Holi, beaten to death by mob
description: A neighbourhood spat over Holi colours turned deadly in Delhi, resulting in the alleged beating death of 26-year-old Tarun Butolia. Tarun was reportedly lured back home by a call claiming his parents were under attack, only to be ambushed by a mob. The violence has a communal undertone, with neighbours from different communities involved.

title: Inside the paradox of Mexico's never-ending war on drugs
description: The decades-long war on drugs, initiated by Nixon, has devolved into a geopolitical quagmire. The recent death of cartel leader El Mencho, hailed as a victory, quickly led to widespread chaos, demonstrating how successes in combating drug trafficking often breed deeper crises and more violence across Latin America.

title: Class chores to exam scores: Gender equity must begin at school
description: Why are some class duties, like cleaning, assigned to girls and lifting heavy stuff assigned to boys? Is it not time to break out of these stereotypical roles? Here’s what students, teachers, and experts say...

title: Microsoft becomes first company to say it is not 'abandoning' Anthropic
description: Microsoft will continue using Anthropic's AI models, including Claude, for its customers despite the US Department of War labeling the startup a supply-chain risk.  The tech giant's legal team reviewed the designation, concluding most clients can still access the technology. This decision comes after the Pentagon's move to phase out Anthropic's systems, sparking debate over AI in defense.
